manualRecoveryNote: This amount is separate from the payable total and is not deducted automatically from the next payout.

detail.description: Review this practitioner's backend balance snapshot and recorded manual payouts.
detail.snapshotNote: Balances shown here come from backend payout balance endpoints. They are a current snapshot for this practitioner and should be checked before recording any manual payout.
detail.manualTransferNote: Recording a payout here documents an external manual transfer. It does not send money automatically from Sawiyaa.
detail.balanceScopeNote: Held amounts are not necessarily available for payout until released by the platform rules.
detail.packageSectionDescription: Package amounts belong to the practitioner account, but the held part stays outside the payoutable total until it is released.
detail.packageSectionNote: Held package amounts are shown for clarity only and cannot be paid now unless the backend release rules already allow it.
detail.historyDescription: This section shows recorded payout entries returned for this practitioner.
